title: Ancient supernova remnants found in Antarctic ice - The Brighter Side of News
description: Ancient supernova remnants found in Antarctic ice The Brighter Side of News Surrounded by stardust: Antarctic ice cores confirm Earth is accumulating iron-60 from local interstellar cloud Phys.org Stardust trapped in Antarctic ice reveals tens of thousands of years of Solar System’s past The Conversation Earth is flying through ancient supernova debris and scientists found the evidence in Antarctic ice ScienceDaily Stardust Trapped in Antarctic Ice Reveals Earth's Journey Through The Cosmos ScienceAlert

title: Tired Of AC? Ancient Indian Cooling Practices That Still Work
description: Amid this heatwave, if the AC feels like too much, you can turn to these ancient cooling practices that helped people stay comfortable long before modern air conditioning.

title: 6-Year-Old Spots Rusty Object On School Trip, Turns Out To Be Ancient Sword
description: The discovery took place in Hadeland, a region in southeastern Norway known for its rich history.

title: Haunting 1,200-year-old ‘DEATH jar’ found stuffed with multiple generations of skeletons linked to ancient burial ritual
description: ARCHAEOLOGISTS have discovered a huge jar densely packed with the teeth and bones of at least 37 different people. The haunting discovery has finally solved the mystery of the Plain of Jars - a spooky landscape in Southeast Asia dotted with stone vessels. Archaeologists dug up the strange find in a forest in the Plain...
